text: Every round-4 recipe change hurt held-out Pearson — AdamW, GELU, label smoothing, longer training, focal loss.

locator.quote: all transferred negatively to this regime

text: Five common literature improvements all transferred negatively to this regime (1M samples, ~40k params).
Focal loss is structurally worst: at the 18% positive rate the abundant easy negatives carry most of the discriminative gradient, so down-weighting them removes signal.
